summary: Strategic Full-Stack Software Engineer and Consultant with 5 years of experience delivering scalable web applications and enterprise solutions. Expert in JavaScript and TypeScript with deep proficiency in React, Node.js, and Vue.js. Proven track record of helping clients optimize legacy systems, migrate to cloud-native architectures, and accelerate product delivery cycles.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / Software Engineer
highlights: Lead technical discovery and implementation for high-growth startups and mid-market enterprises
Refactored monolithic PHP application into microservices architecture using Node.js and NestJS, achieving 40% improvement in system response times
Orchestrated front-end migration from legacy jQuery to React/Next.js, improving SEO scores and mobile conversion rates by 22%
Provided strategic technical debt assessments and roadmap planning for C-suite stakeholders

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Developed and maintained complex user interfaces using Vue.js and Vuex for FinTech dashboard serving 50k+ active users
Integrated third-party APIs and payment gateways (Stripe, PagSeguro) ensuring high security and transaction reliability
Built reusable internal component library, reducing front-end development time by 30%
Mentored 3 junior developers through code reviews and pair programming

experience.title: Junior Software Developer
highlights: Contributed to development of real-time messaging app using JavaScript and Socket.io
Assisted in transitioning codebase from JavaScript to TypeScript to enhance type safety and maintainability
